title: Model Configuration Management
use_cases: Set model architecture components (net, vae, conditioner)
Set SDE noise schedule parameters (p_mean, p_std, sigma_max, sigma_min)
Configure distributed training (FSDP policy, sharding strategy, group size)
Configure loss settings (loss_mask, loss_add_logvar, loss_reduce, loss_scale)
Set latent shape dimensions [T, C, H, W]
Register config groups (text2world, video2world, multiview variants)

key_classes.name: MultiviewModelConfig
key_classes.note: Training variant; inference variant has n_views=4 in diffusion/config/base/model.py

key_classes.name: DefaultModelConfig
key_fields: sde: LazyDict = L(EDMSDE)(p_mean=0.0, p_std=1.0, sigma_max=80, sigma_min=0.0002)

key_classes.name: Config
key_fields: defaults: List (data_train, data_val, optimizer=fusedadamw, scheduler=lambdalinear, net, conditioner, fsdp, ema=power, vae=vae1, checkpoint=pbss, ckpt_klass=fsdp)
key_classes.make_config: make_config() instantiates Config with MultiviewModelConfig(), sets trainer.max_iter=400000, registers all config group variants

key_relationships: DefaultModelConfig references EDMSDE via LazyCall (sde field)
Config composes MultiviewModelConfig as model field
make_config() registers: register_configs_text2world, register_configs_video2world, register_configs_text2world_multiview, register_configs_video2world_multiview
Two MultiviewModelConfig variants exist: training (n_views=6) and inference (n_views=4)
important_notes: Uses attrs.define(slots=False) for all config classes. LazyDict/LazyCall enables deferred instantiation. Two parallel MultiviewModelConfig classes exist in training vs inference config paths. FSDP distributed training embedded directly in model config. PEFT control allows parameter-efficient finetuning overlay.
